ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "svi" REAL /* Stock Volatility Index */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the recorded price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the beginning of the month */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the month */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the month */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the month */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total trading volume for the month */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the recorded volume */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume for that month */,
  "daily_volume" TEXT /* Daily trading volume */,
  "average_volume" TEXT /* Average trading volume over a specified period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_sentiment" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sentiment analysis record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "tweet_count" REAL /* Count of tweets related to the stock */,
  "positive_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of positive sentiment */,
  "negative_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of negative sentiment */,
  "neutral_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of neutral sentiment */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Combined sentiment score */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitter_sentiment_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sentiment" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the news sentiment analysis record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "news_count" REAL /* Count of news articles related to the stock */,
  "positive_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of positive sentiment */,
  "negative_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of negative sentiment */,
  "neutral_sentiment" REAL /* Percentage of neutral sentiment */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Combined sentiment score */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_sentiment_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "si" REAL /* Stock Indicator value */,
  "si_ratio" REAL /* Stock Indicator Ratio */,
  "iv_midpoint" REAL /* Implied Volatility Midpoint */,
  "pc_ratio" REAL /* Put/Call Ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings Ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend Yield */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID to monitor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, sentiment drop) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend record */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "overall_sentiment" REAL /* Overall sentiment score for the market on that date */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the trend */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the trend */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* Factor that triggered the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
